  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to visualize intracellular sialylation using Click Chemistry and Expansion Microscopy. The protocol involves washing samples with PBS, incubating them for 45 minutes in the dark, tagging sialylated glycans with N-azidoacetylmannosamine, and performing CuAAC labeling. The final step involves imaging the cells using confocal microscopy.",
